log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Changeling — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Changeling — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Changeling — Iron Concentration HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Changeling — Iron Concentration HP: 34/67
--- Changeling — Iron Concentration --- HP: 34/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 1 ══
